title: Efficient Rotations With Phase Gradient States
seoDescription: The ability to perform arbitrary rotations is essential for the realization of usable algorithms on quantum computers. These operations, however, are expensive when one considers the resources required to translate these operations into fault-tolerant systems. To minimize gate costs, efficient gate synthesis methods, of which the phase gradient method is a prominent example, should be selected for implementation. This demo will explore how the phase gradient state can be used to perform efficient rotations in quantum systems.
